rulings.Case Title: WAUKEEN Q. MCCOY VS. KEN PAGE et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 22, 2015 line 1. DEFENDANTs HARRY CLARK and D.D.P.M., INC.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend to allege abandonment by the trustee or substitute trustee as plaintiff. The Court does not address other grounds for demurrer as standing is the threshold issue that needs to be resolved first. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LY DINH NGUYEN et al VS. QUYNH-MAI TON-NU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 22, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANTS TOAN THAT and QUYNHMAI TONNU's AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Issues Continued to October 6, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of moving papers to department 501 no later that September 22, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOWARD L WESTON AS TRUSTEE OF THE HOWAR L WESTON VS. MIMI LAY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Pursuant To Ccp 437c(F)(1)/ And Notice Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 22, 2015 line 3. PLAINTIFF HOWARD L WESTON AS TRUSTEE OF THE HOWARD L WESTON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Continued to September 29, 2015. Written opposition, if any, shall be filed in accordance with the original hearing date. Written reply, if any, shall be filed no later than September 24, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LUCY P DESCHAUMES ET AL VS. CARMELITA ROTH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 22, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANT ALFONSO ROMANO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain regarding the ownership of the property and the plaintiffs' suing in their capacity as trustees. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. LASHAWN GIESE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 22, 2015 line 6. DEFENDANT LASHAWN GIESE's Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment GRANTED, subject to (1) opposition; (2) defendant presenting a proof of service for the motion to vacate; and (3) defendant posting $1,452.50 no later than September 22, 2105 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/REQ)
